insights.title: Business Name & Category Clarity
insights.details: The business name and category lack specificity, which can hinder discoverability and AI understanding. Clear, descriptive names and categories enhance recognition.

insights.title: AI-Compatible Descriptions
insights.details: Descriptions are generic and do not incorporate relevant entities or keywords related to services offered. Rich, entity-driven descriptions improve AI processing.

insights.title: Review Sentiment & Mentions
insights.details: Recent reviews/mentions show mixed or negative sentiment with minimal mentions of specific services or features, reducing AI interpretability.

insights: Entity Verification Confidence is very low (0%), indicating no OSM data match and possibly significant entity discrepancy or incomplete data.

findings.title: Entity Mismatch / Data Absence
findings.description: No matching OSM data suggests that the business presence isn't verified or may be incorrectly listed.
findings.impact: Limits local SEO efficacy, confuses AI systems, and reduces trustworthiness.
findings.fix_example: Update and verify the GBP with accurate address, website, and service info; add complete OSM data if possible.

findings.title: Lack of Rich Descriptive Content
findings.description: The current description does not include relevant entities or keywords, limiting AI compatibility.
findings.impact: Reduces discoverability and AI understanding, impacting ranking and local visibility.
findings.fix_example: Revise the business description to include relevant services, keywords, and entities such as 'consulting', 'software solutions', 'customer support'.

findings.title: Negative or Insufficient Review Sentiment
findings.description: Limited positive feedback and sparse mention of specific services.
findings.impact: Weakens AI's contextual understanding and hampers reputation signals.
findings.fix_example: Encourage satisfied customers to leave detailed reviews mentioning specific services and positive experiences.
